summary: Raw Fox News 'Breaking News' footage of President Trump speaking to reporters on the tarmac at Palm Beach International Airport, blaming Democrats for the DHS shutdown and listing grievances. A lightly-edited gaggle/speech clip with news chyrons, no music or cinematic styling.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT 'NOW: TRUMP SPEAKS ON I.C.E. AGENTS AT AIRPORTS' / 'NOW: TRUMP SPEAKS ON BATTLE OVER DHS FUNDING'
